mapper.sql: id, code, name, value, description, path, language, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM openplatform_property_t
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{path}, '%')
AND language = #{language}
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1000
